roadmap.target_role: Software Engineer at Product Company (e.g., Barclays)
roadmap.milestone_count_rationale: 6 milestones: The learner is a beginner web developer aiming for a product company like Barclays, which represents an extreme gap. This requires 6 distinct identity transitions to build foundational DSA, core system design, advanced optimization, and interview readiness within the given timeframe, ensuring each step is a market-recognized identity.

vision_profile.current_state: A web developer at Accenture with 2 years of experience, proficient in Python and Django, and basic knowledge of Data Structures and Algorithms.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The primary blocker is the need to significantly enhance Data Structures and Algorithms knowledge and acquire strong system design skills to meet the rigorous technical bar of product companies like Barclays.
vision_profile.top_motivation: The learner is motivated to switch to a product company to advance their career and work on more impactful, scalable systems.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: After this milestone, the learner can confidently solve fundamental data structure and algorithm problems using Python, demonstrating a solid grasp of problem-solving techniques.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules: This milestone focuses on building core DSA and problem-solving skills, requiring distinct modules for data structures, algorithms, and strategic problem-solving approaches.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a problem-solver, building the analytical foundation to tackle complex technical challenges.

project.title: Implement a Basic Inventory Management System
project.description: Design and implement a console-based inventory management system using Python, incorporating fundamental data structures like arrays/lists and dictionaries. The system should allow adding, removing, and searching for items, and managing stock levels.
project.deliverable: A functional Python application with clear code, unit tests, and a brief design document explaining data structure choices. Deployed to a simple cloud environment (e.g., Heroku free tier or similar).
seeded_errors: The AI-generated search function uses a linear scan for a large dataset, leading to O(N) performance when O(log N) or O(1) is achievable with a different data structure.

modules.title: Core Data Structures
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on the most fundamental data structures essential for any software engineer, ensuring a focused and deep understanding.

skills.title: Arrays and Lists
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering arrays and lists is fundamental for efficient data storage and manipulation, crucial for optimizing code performance in product companies.

video.title: Understanding Arrays and Lists in Python

scenario.title: Optimizing List Operations in a Data Processing Pipeline

skills.title: Linked Lists
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding linked lists is crucial for scenarios requiring efficient insertions/deletions and forms the basis for more complex data structures.

scenario.title: Debugging a Circular Linked List in a Cache System

skills.title: Stacks and Queues
skills.why_this_skill: Stacks and queues are fundamental for managing function calls, task scheduling, and various algorithmic problems, essential for robust software design.

video.title: Stacks and Queues: Applications in Web Development

scenario.title: Fixing a Request Queue Overflow in a Microservice

science.desc: A new feature in your web application is causing slow response times due to inefficient data retrieval from a large list. Identify the bottleneck and propose a data structure optimization.

modules.title: Essential Algorithms
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module covers core algorithmic paradigms, providing the essential tools for efficient problem-solving.

skills.title: Sorting & Searching
skills.why_this_skill: Efficient searching is critical for quick data retrieval in large datasets, directly impacting application performance and user experience.

scenario.title: Optimizing a Product Catalog Search Feature

skills.title: Sorting & Searching
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding sorting algorithms is key for organizing data efficiently, which is fundamental for many data processing tasks and database operations.
lessons: Bubble Sort, Selection Sort, Insertion Sort

scenario.title: Resolving Performance Issues with a Custom Sorting Function

skills.title: Recursion
skills.why_this_skill: Recursion is a powerful problem-solving technique, essential for algorithms involving tree/graph traversals and dynamic programming, frequently tested in interviews.
lessons: Understanding Base Cases and Recursive Steps

scenario.title: Debugging a Stack Overflow Error in a Recursive Function

science.desc: A new feature requires sorting a list of user preferences, but the current implementation is too slow for large user bases. Choose and implement a more efficient sorting algorithm.

modules.title: Problem Solving Strategies
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module equips learners with strategic thinking and analytical tools to approach and solve algorithmic problems effectively.

skills.title: Time and Space Complexity Analysis
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding complexity is fundamental for evaluating algorithm efficiency and making informed design choices, a core skill for any product engineer.

video.title: Mastering Big O Notation for DSA

scenario.title: Estimating Performance of a New Feature Before Implementation

skills.title: Two Pointers and Sliding Window
skills.why_this_skill: These techniques are powerful for optimizing array/string problems, reducing time complexity, and are frequently encountered in coding interviews.

video.title: Solving Array Problems with Two Pointers

scenario.title: Optimizing a Log File Parser for Large Inputs

skills.title: Hashing and Hash Maps
skills.why_this_skill: Hash maps provide near O(1) average time complexity for lookups, insertions, and deletions, making them indispensable for high-performance applications and frequently used in algorithmic problems.

video.title: Understanding Python Dictionaries as Hash Maps

scenario.title: Diagnosing Performance Degradation in a User Session Store

science.desc: A new feature requires finding duplicate entries in a large dataset. The current O(N^2) approach is too slow. Design and implement an O(N) solution using appropriate data structures.
Given an array of integers, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to a specific target. Explain your approach, time, and space complexity.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: After this milestone, the learner can design and implement robust, object-oriented backend components, demonstrating proficiency in API design, concurrency, and clean code principles.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules: This milestone focuses on building core backend engineering capabilities, covering object-oriented design, API development, and handling concurrent operations.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a builder of robust backend systems, capable of crafting clean and efficient code.

project.title: Build a RESTful API for a Microblogging Service
project.description: Design and implement a RESTful API for a microblogging service (like Twitter Lite) using Python and a framework like Flask/FastAPI. Focus on clean architecture, OOP principles, and handling concurrent requests for posts, users, and followers.
project.deliverable: A functional API with endpoints for user management, post creation/retrieval, and basic following functionality. Includes unit tests, API documentation (e.g., OpenAPI/Swagger), and a deployment to a cloud platform.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated API endpoint for creating a new post does not handle concurrent requests correctly, leading to data inconsistencies or race conditions.

modules.title: OOP & SOLID Principles
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module establishes the foundational principles for writing maintainable, scalable, and testable code, crucial for complex systems.

skills.title: OOP Basics
skills.why_this_skill: Object-Oriented Programming is a cornerstone of modern software development, enabling modular, reusable, and maintainable codebases.

video.title: Mastering OOP in Python for Backend Development

scenario.title: Refactoring a Monolithic Function into OOP Classes

skills.title: SOLID Principles
skills.why_this_skill: SOLID principles are guidelines for writing robust, maintainable, and scalable software, essential for professional-grade backend development.

scenario.title: Identifying SOLID Violations in an Existing Codebase

skills.title: Creational & Structural Patterns
skills.why_this_skill: Design patterns provide reusable solutions to common software design problems, leading to more robust, flexible, and understandable systems.

video.title: Common Design Patterns for Backend Services

scenario.title: Choosing the Right Design Pattern for a New Feature

science.desc: A legacy module in your system is difficult to extend and test. Apply SOLID principles and appropriate design patterns to refactor it for better maintainability.

modules.title: API Design & Service Layer
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on the practical aspects of building well-structured and efficient APIs, a core responsibility of backend engineers.

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: Designing effective RESTful APIs is crucial for building interoperable and scalable backend services, a standard in product companies.

video.title: Best Practices for REST API Design

scenario.title: Designing a New API Endpoint for a Complex Feature

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: Securing APIs is paramount to protect sensitive data and prevent unauthorized access, a non-negotiable aspect of product development.

scenario.title: Responding to a Potential API Security Vulnerability Report

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: API Gateways are essential for managing, securing, and scaling microservices architectures, a common pattern in large product companies.

video.title: Implementing an API Gateway for Microservices

scenario.title: Configuring an API Gateway for a New Microservice Deployment

science.desc: A new client application needs to consume your backend services, but requires a single, unified entry point with rate limiting. Design an API Gateway strategy.

modules.title: Concurrency & Multithreading
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module covers essential techniques for building responsive and efficient applications by managing concurrent operations, vital for high-performance systems.

skills.title: Concurrency & Multithreading
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding concurrency is crucial for building responsive applications and efficiently utilizing system resources, especially in multi-core environments.

scenario.title: Identifying a Bottleneck in a Multi-threaded Data Scraper

skills.title: Safety
skills.why_this_skill: Ensuring thread safety is critical to prevent data corruption and race conditions in concurrent applications, a common challenge in product development.

scenario.title: Debugging a Race Condition in a Shared Resource Update

skills.title: Asynchronous I/O with asyncio
skills.why_this_skill: Asyncio is Python's modern approach to concurrent programming, ideal for I/O-bound tasks in web services and network applications, improving scalability and responsiveness.

video.title: Building High-Performance APIs with FastAPI and Asyncio

scenario.title: Optimizing an I/O Bound Microservice with Asyncio

science.desc: Explain the difference between concurrency and parallelism. Describe a scenario where you would use Python's `threading` module versus `asyncio`.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: After this milestone, the learner can design scalable and resilient system architectures, making informed decisions on distributed systems, database choices, and performance optimization strategies.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules: This milestone focuses on high-level system design, covering distributed systems, data storage, and scalability patterns, essential for architecting large-scale applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming an architect of robust and scalable systems, capable of envisioning and designing complex infrastructures.

project.title: Design a Scalable E-commerce Product Catalog Service
project.description: Design a high-level architecture for a product catalog service for a large e-commerce platform. Consider millions of products, high read/write traffic, and global availability. Propose database choices, caching strategies, and scaling mechanisms.
project.deliverable: A detailed system design document including architectural diagrams (e.g., C4 model), data schema, API specifications, and a justification for technology choices. Present the design in a mock review.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated database choice for product search is a relational database, which will struggle with schema changes and horizontal scaling for a global e-commerce catalog.

modules.title: Distributed Systems Fundamentals
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module introduces the core concepts and challenges of building systems across multiple machines, a prerequisite for modern scalable architectures.

skills.title: Microservices Architecture
skills.why_this_skill: Microservices are a dominant architectural style in product companies, enabling independent development, deployment, and scaling of services.

video.title: Designing with Microservices: A Practical Guide

scenario.title: Deciding to Migrate a Monolithic Application to Microservices

skills.title: Distributed Transactions & Consistency
skills.why_this_skill: Managing data consistency across distributed systems is a complex but critical challenge, requiring understanding of various models and trade-offs.

scenario.title: Designing a Transactional System Across Multiple Microservices

skills.title: Message Queues
skills.why_this_skill: Message queues and event streams are vital for asynchronous communication, decoupling services, and building resilient, scalable distributed systems.

scenario.title: Designing an Event-Driven Architecture for Real-time Analytics

science.desc: A critical service is experiencing high load and becoming a bottleneck. Propose an architectural change using message queues to decouple it and improve resilience.

modules.title: Databases & Storage Solutions
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module covers various database types and storage strategies, enabling learners to choose the right data solution for different architectural needs.

skills.title: Vector Databases
skills.why_this_skill: Relational databases are foundational for structured data storage and complex queries, widely used in enterprise systems like those at Barclays.

scenario.title: Optimizing a Slow SQL Query in a Production Database

skills.title: Vector Databases
skills.why_this_skill: NoSQL databases offer flexibility and scalability for various data models, complementing relational databases in modern architectures.

video.title: Exploring NoSQL Options for Scalable Data

scenario.title: Designing a User Profile Store for High Read/Write Throughput

skills.title: Sharding
skills.why_this_skill: Partitioning and sharding are essential techniques for scaling databases horizontally, managing large datasets, and improving performance in distributed systems.

scenario.title: Planning a Database Sharding Strategy for a Growing User Base

science.desc: Your company's main user database is reaching its capacity limits. Propose a data partitioning strategy to handle future growth without downtime.

modules.title: Scalability & Performance Patterns
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on practical strategies and patterns to ensure systems can handle increasing load and maintain high performance.

skills.title: Caching & Performance Optimization
skills.why_this_skill: Caching is a fundamental technique for improving application performance and reducing database load, critical for high-traffic systems.

video.title: Implementing Effective Caching in Distributed Systems

scenario.title: Diagnosing Stale Data Issues in a Caching Layer

skills.title: API Design & Service Layer
skills.why_this_skill: Load balancing and auto-scaling are essential for distributing traffic and dynamically adjusting resources to handle varying loads, ensuring high availability and performance.
lessons: Types of Load Balancers (L4 vs. L7)

scenario.title: Configuring Auto-Scaling for a Seasonal Traffic Spike

skills.title: Content Delivery Networks (CDNs)
skills.why_this_skill: CDNs are critical for delivering static and dynamic content quickly and reliably to users globally, improving user experience and reducing server load.

video.title: Leveraging CDNs for Global Content Delivery

scenario.title: Reducing Latency for Global Users with CDN Integration

science.desc: Design a system to handle 1 million concurrent users for a social media feed. Discuss how you would scale the database, application servers, and handle caching.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: After this milestone, the learner can analyze, optimize, and implement efficient algorithms for complex problems, demonstrating mastery of advanced data structures and algorithmic paradigms.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules: This milestone deepens the learner's DSA expertise, covering advanced data structures, dynamic programming, and graph algorithms, crucial for competitive programming and complex problem-solving.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming an optimizer, capable of crafting highly efficient solutions to intricate algorithmic challenges.

project.title: Build a Route Optimization Service
project.description: Develop a service that finds the shortest path between two points on a map (represented as a graph) using advanced graph algorithms. Implement Dijkstra's or A* algorithm and consider edge cases like disconnected graphs.
project.deliverable: A Python service with a clear API for pathfinding, unit tests, and a demonstration of its efficiency. Deploy the service to a cloud platform.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated graph traversal algorithm fails to correctly handle negative edge weights, leading to incorrect shortest path calculations in certain scenarios.

modules.title: Trees & Graphs
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module covers two of the most versatile and frequently encountered data structures in computer science, essential for modeling complex relationships.

skills.title: Trees and Binary Trees
skills.why_this_skill: Trees are fundamental for hierarchical data, search structures, and parsing, widely used in databases, compilers, and file systems.

video.title: Implementing Binary Search Trees in Python

scenario.title: Debugging a Corrupted Binary Search Tree After Insertions

skills.title: Graphs and Representations
skills.why_this_skill: Graphs are powerful for modeling relationships (social networks, routes, dependencies) and are a staple in advanced algorithmic problems.

scenario.title: Optimizing a Social Network Friend Recommendation Algorithm

skills.title: Shortest Path Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: Shortest path algorithms are critical for navigation, network routing, and resource allocation, frequently appearing in advanced interview problems.

scenario.title: Implementing a Real-time Traffic-Aware Navigation System

science.desc: A new feature needs to find the fastest delivery route between warehouses. Implement an appropriate shortest path algorithm, considering varying road conditions (edge weights).

modules.title: Dynamic Programming & Greedy Algorithms
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module introduces advanced algorithmic paradigms for solving optimization problems, frequently tested in high-level coding interviews.

skills.title: Dynamic Programming Introduction
skills.why_this_skill: Dynamic Programming is a powerful technique for solving complex optimization problems by breaking them into overlapping subproblems, a key skill for advanced roles.

scenario.title: Optimizing a Recursive Financial Calculation with DP

skills.title: Classic DP Problems
skills.why_this_skill: Solving classic DP problems builds intuition and pattern recognition, essential for tackling new and complex algorithmic challenges.

video.title: Solving the Knapsack Problem with DP

scenario.title: Optimizing Resource Allocation for Cloud Instances

skills.title: Greedy Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: Greedy algorithms offer simple yet effective solutions for certain optimization problems, providing a different approach to problem-solving than DP.

scenario.title: Designing a Task Scheduler for Maximum Throughput

science.desc: You need to find the maximum profit from buying and selling a stock, given an array of prices. Implement a solution using either DP or a greedy approach, justifying your choice.

modules.title: Advanced Data Structures
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module introduces specialized data structures that provide optimal solutions for specific problem types, enhancing the learner's algorithmic toolkit.

skills.title: Heaps and Priority Queues
skills.why_this_skill: Heaps are essential for efficiently managing priority-based data, crucial for algorithms like Dijkstra's and for implementing priority queues.

video.title: Heaps and Priority Queues in Python

scenario.title: Designing a Task Scheduler with Dynamic Priorities

skills.title: Tries (Prefix Trees)
skills.why_this_skill: Tries are highly efficient for string-related operations like autocomplete and spell checkers, frequently used in search and text processing systems.

video.title: Building an Autocomplete System with Tries

scenario.title: Optimizing a Search Bar's Autocomplete Feature for Speed

skills.title: Disjoint Set Union (DSU)
skills.why_this_skill: DSU is an efficient data structure for managing sets of elements partitioned into disjoint subsets, useful for connectivity problems in graphs and networks.

video.title: Disjoint Set Union for Connectivity Problems

scenario.title: Detecting Cycles in a Network Topology

science.desc: Given a list of words, find all words that can be formed by combining other words in the list. Discuss the optimal data structure and algorithm for this problem.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: After this milestone, the learner can build, test, and deploy production-grade features, integrating design and algorithmic thinking into a robust development lifecycle.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules: This milestone focuses on the practical aspects of delivering production-ready software, covering testing, deployment, and monitoring, essential for a product company role.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a product deliverer, capable of transforming ideas into reliable, shippable software.

project.title: Develop and Deploy a Real-time Notification Service
project.description: Build a real-time notification service that integrates with a message queue (e.g., RabbitMQ) to send notifications to users. Implement robust testing, CI/CD pipelines, and basic monitoring for the service.
project.deliverable: A Python-based notification service with unit/integration tests, a CI/CD pipeline definition (e.g., GitHub Actions), and a deployed, monitored instance on a cloud platform.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated CI/CD pipeline configuration has a missing dependency installation step, causing deployment failures in the staging environment.

modules.title: Testing & Quality Assurance
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module covers essential testing methodologies and tools to ensure the quality, reliability, and correctness of software, a critical aspect of product engineering.

skills.title: Testing & QA
skills.why_this_skill: Unit testing is the foundation of quality assurance, ensuring individual components work as expected and preventing regressions.

scenario.title: Writing Unit Tests for a Complex Business Logic Function

skills.title: Testing & QA
skills.why_this_skill: Integration testing ensures that different modules and services interact correctly, crucial for distributed systems and complex applications.

scenario.title: Debugging a Failed Integration Test in a Microservice Chain

skills.title: Test-Driven Development (TDD)
skills.why_this_skill: TDD is a development practice that improves code quality, design, and maintainability by writing tests before code, leading to more robust software.

scenario.title: Applying TDD to Develop a New Feature with Strict Requirements

science.desc: A critical bug is reported in production. Write a failing test case that reproduces the bug, then fix the bug and ensure the test passes, following TDD principles.

modules.title: CI/CD & Deployment Strategies
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on automating the software delivery pipeline, enabling rapid, reliable, and frequent deployments, a hallmark of modern product development.

skills.title: Continuous Integration (CI)
skills.why_this_skill: CI is crucial for maintaining code quality and detecting integration issues early, accelerating development cycles and reducing risks.

video.title: Building a CI Pipeline with GitHub Actions

scenario.title: Troubleshooting a Failing CI Build Due to Test Failures

skills.title: Cloud & Deployment
skills.why_this_skill: CD enables automated, reliable releases to production, reducing manual errors and accelerating time-to-market for new features.

scenario.title: Executing a Blue/Green Deployment for a Critical Service Update

skills.title: Docker & Containerization
skills.why_this_skill: Docker is the industry standard for containerization, providing consistent environments for development, testing, and production, simplifying deployment and scaling.

scenario.title: Optimizing a Dockerfile for Smaller Image Size and Faster Builds

science.desc: A new microservice needs to be deployed. Create a Dockerfile and integrate it into an existing CI/CD pipeline for automated builds and deployments.

modules.title: Monitoring & Observability
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on gaining deep insights into system behavior, enabling proactive issue detection, performance optimization, and robust incident response.

skills.title: Monitoring & Observability
skills.why_this_skill: Effective logging and metrics collection are foundational for understanding application behavior, debugging issues, and monitoring system health in production.

video.title: Implementing Robust Logging in Python Applications

scenario.title: Diagnosing a Production Issue Using Centralized Logs

skills.title: Monitoring & Observability
skills.why_this_skill: Proactive monitoring and alerting are essential for detecting and responding to issues before they impact users, ensuring system reliability and availability.

video.title: Setting Up Effective Monitoring and Alerting

scenario.title: Responding to a Critical Alert for High Latency in a Production Service

skills.title: Distributed Systems
skills.why_this_skill: Distributed tracing provides end-to-end visibility into requests across microservices, essential for debugging complex distributed systems.

scenario.title: Identifying the Root Cause of a Latency Spike Across Multiple Services

science.desc: You've just deployed a new feature, and users are reporting intermittent errors. Describe your process for debugging and resolving this issue in a production environment.

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: After this milestone, the learner can confidently navigate technical and behavioral interviews, demonstrating readiness for a Software Engineer role at top product companies like Barclays.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules: This final milestone focuses on comprehensive interview preparation, covering technical strategies, behavioral aspects, and career readiness to secure a target role.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a confident and prepared candidate, ready to articulate your skills and secure your dream role at a leading product company.

project.title: Technical Interview Problem Set & Mock Interview Simulation
project.description: Solve a curated set of advanced DSA and System Design problems, simulating real interview conditions. Document thought processes, code solutions, and architectural decisions. Participate in a full-length mock interview.
project.deliverable: A portfolio of solved DSA problems with optimal solutions and complexity analysis, a detailed system design proposal for a complex problem, and a recorded mock interview with self-reflection.
seeded_errors: The AI-generated solution for a complex graph problem has a subtle edge case bug that leads to incorrect results for specific inputs, which must be identified and fixed during review.

modules.title: Technical Interview Strategies
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module provides strategic approaches and practice for excelling in coding interviews, focusing on problem-solving under pressure.

skills.title: Coding Interview Techniques
skills.why_this_skill: Mastering coding interview techniques is essential for demonstrating problem-solving abilities and algorithmic proficiency under timed conditions.

video.title: Cracking the Coding Interview: A Strategic Approach

scenario.title: Simulating a Live Coding Interview with a Challenging DSA Problem

skills.title: Mock Interview Practice (DSA)
skills.why_this_skill: Consistent mock interview practice is crucial for building confidence, refining communication, and identifying areas for improvement in a low-stakes environment.

video.title: Effective Mock Interview Strategies for DSA

scenario.title: Analyzing a Mock Interview Performance for Improvement Areas

skills.title: Behavioral Interview Preparation
skills.why_this_skill: Behavioral interviews assess soft skills, cultural fit, and past experiences, which are equally important as technical skills for securing a role.

scenario.title: Practicing Responses to 'Tell Me About a Time You Failed' Question

skills.title: Foundations of System Design
skills.why_this_skill: Covers required domain: advanced_architecture

skills.title: Scalability & Performance
skills.why_this_skill: Covers required domain: scalability

science.desc: During a mock interview, you struggle to articulate your thought process for a complex problem. Develop a strategy to improve your communication under pressure.

modules.title: System Design Interview Prep
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on preparing for system design interviews, where candidates must demonstrate their ability to architect complex, scalable systems.

skills.title: Foundations of System Design
skills.why_this_skill: A structured approach to system design interviews helps candidates cover all critical aspects and communicate their design effectively.

video.title: A Step-by-Step Guide to System Design Interviews

scenario.title: Designing a URL Shortening Service Under Interview Conditions

skills.title: Foundations of System Design
skills.why_this_skill: Practicing common system design problems builds a repertoire of solutions and patterns, enabling quick and effective design in interviews.

video.title: Deep Dive into Designing a Scalable Chat System

scenario.title: Critiquing an Existing System Design for a Video Streaming Service

skills.title: Cloud Architecture Patterns
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding cloud-native architecture patterns is essential for designing modern, scalable, and cost-effective systems in product companies that leverage cloud infrastructure.

scenario.title: Migrating a Legacy Application to a Serverless Architecture

science.desc: You are asked to design a highly available and fault-tolerant payment processing system. Outline the key components and cloud services you would use.

modules.title: Portfolio & Resume Optimization
modules.skill_count_rationale: 3 skills: This module focuses on presenting the learner's skills and experience effectively to recruiters and hiring managers, maximizing their chances of securing interviews.

skills.title: Resume Crafting for Product Companies
skills.why_this_skill: A well-crafted resume is the first impression, crucial for passing initial screening and securing interview opportunities at competitive product companies.

video.title: Building an Impactful Resume for Tech Roles

scenario.title: Reviewing and Optimizing a Peer's Resume for a Target Role

skills.why_this_skill: A strong portfolio demonstrates practical skills and project experience, providing tangible proof of capability beyond what a resume can convey.

scenario.title: Crafting a Narrative for a Complex Project in Your Portfolio

skills.title: Networking & Communication
skills.why_this_skill: Effective networking and job search strategies are crucial for discovering opportunities, gaining referrals, and navigating the competitive job market.

scenario.title: Preparing for a Salary Negotiation with a Product Company

science.desc: You've received an offer from a product company. Role-play a salary negotiation, aiming to maximize your compensation and benefits.
